channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Mehdi Taremi, assistant coach, held up at airport by US officials, Iran says
item.description: Iranian team's trip to Seattle was delayed by 25 minutes as Taremi and Alhoei were held up for an undisclosed reason.

item.title: Palestinian activist faints after his release from Israeli prison
item.description: Palestinian activist Abdullah Shatat collapsed moments after his release from an Israeli jail.

item.title: Family sues Tesla for wrongful death in Autopilot crash in Texas, US
item.description: Lawsuit claims Tesla's Autopilot shortcomings led to fatal crash; family seeks $1m in damages and punitive measures.

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Senate approves amendment extending presidential term
item.description: Constitutional amendment will keep President Mnangagwa in office until 2030 and allow parliament to elect the president.

item.title: US public health agency concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases
item.description: The US Department of Health and Human Services has announced the end of the monitoring period for the virus.

item.title: Top European leaders vow ‘strong’ support for Ukraine ahead of NATO summit
item.description: E5 talks in Berlin took place between heads of state of Britain, France, Italy, Poland and Germany ahead of July summit.

item.title: US judge blocks Trump subpoenas into transgender care at New York hospitals
item.description: The Trump administration has called for a probe into transgender healthcare, leading it to subpoena medical records.

item.title: At least three killed in drone strikes in Russian controlled Horlivka
item.description: A multi-storey apartment has been hit with what Russian-installed authorities called a Ukrainian drone strike.

item.title: Rubio: US ‘completely aligned’ with Gulf allies on Iran
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Washington will be “completely aligned” with Gulf allies in Iran peace talks.

item.title: De la Espriella pledges to restore Colombia’s relations with Israel
item.description: The far-right president-elect has pledged to rebuild ties with Israel and the US following tensions under Gustavo Petro.

item.title: UN nuclear chief says Iran inspections will happen, Tehran says after deal
item.description: Head of the IAEA, Rafael Grossi, said the MoU stated 'explicitly' that the agency would supervise inspections in Iran.

item.title: Wins by Mamdani-backed candidates deal blow to pro-Israel camp in US
item.description: Palestinian rights advocates hail 'political earthquake' in New York as progressives beat several pro-Israel candidates.

item.title: Why does Israel want to be less dependent on US weapons?
item.description: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has called for Israel to pursue 'armaments independence'.

item.title: Dutch PM unveils Moluccan monument marking dark colonial chapter
item.description: Dutch PM Rob Jetten unveiled a Moluccan memorial commemorating decades of mistreatment endured by the Moluccan community

item.title: Our life stops’: West Bank childhood shattered by Israeli military raids
item.description: A new UN report documents killings, detentions and lasting psychological harm to Palestinian children.

item.title: Ivan Cepeda concedes defeat in Colombia election, sealing right-wing win
item.description: Presidential candidate Ivan Cepeda accepted the victory of his opponent Abelardo de la Espriella.

item.title: Palestinian boy amongst dead in Israeli strike on displaced tent in Gaza
item.description: An Israeli drone strike on a tent sheltering displaced Palestinians in Khan Younis killed two people, including a child.

item.title: LIVE: Scotland vs Brazil – World Cup 2026
item.description: Updates of Scotland vs Brazil, who have Neymar back from injury, via our buildup and text commentary stream coverage.

item.title: What to know about the Israeli-developed chip in Apple’s iPhone 17e
item.description: There’s more to the iPhone 17e than meets the eye. Like an advanced silicon chip that is said to be developed in Israel.

item.title: Flash floods hit India’s Arunachal Pradesh
item.description: Torrential rain has triggered flash floods and landslides in India's northeastern state of Arunachal Pradesh.

item.title: Did Brexit actually work?
item.description: A vote that changed Britain forever. Ten years after Brexit, the UK is still grappling with its consequences.

item.title: Iran’s president awarded honorary doctorate in Pakistan
item.description: Iran’s President Masoud Pezeshkian was awarded an honorary medical fellowship in cardiac surgery.

item.title: The children Gaza lost
item.description: What does a new UN report documenting the killing and suffering of Palestinian children in Gaza reveal?

item.title: Amid Israeli incursions, this mother demands the return of her son
item.description: Many Lebanese civilians have gone missing amid continuous Israeli incursions in the south.

item.title: ABC ‘fighting back’, urging US public to defend stations amid FCC scrutiny
item.description: Donald Trump has intensified criticism of ABC, alleging bias and threatening lawsuits over network's recent coverage.
